title: Day 2 Lesson 4 ( Video )Asking who has ownership of an object
html:
Day 2 - Lesson 4

もちぬしを　きく = Asking who has ownership of an object

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): せんせい (Teacher), りゅうがくせい (study abroad student)、だいがくせい (University student)

The new words you find in this lesson are:

さよなら (sayonara) = Goodbye

ちょっと (chotto) = a moment

まって (matte) = wait/hold on

きょうかしょ (kyookasho) = textbook

わたしの (watashino) = mine

ぺんけーす (pen keesu) = pencil case

いいえ (iie) = no

きをつけて (ki o tsukete) = take care

ください (kudasai) = please
